'''Bilios''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Bilios system/Legends|Bilios system]] of the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector's]] [[Melantha Province]].<ref name="LE" /> The [[Justice Action Network]] once maintained a base on the planet.<ref name="ES" />

{{Planet-stub}}
